# Discussions: onboarding guide

This repo uses GitHub Discussions as the first stop for many contributor questions.

## Categories
- **Announcements** — releases/news (maintainers only)
- **Q&A** — questions about using Sanctifier or Soroban security
- **Ideas** — proposals before opening an issue
- **Show and tell** — integrations/projects built with Sanctifier
- **General** — everything else

## Where to post
- If you need **help using the tool** → **Q&A**
- If you want to **propose a feature** → **Ideas**
- If you have an **actionable task** (bug/feature/doc) → open an Issue
